name: cursed
description: Multi-model panel review, plan verification, delegation, and advisory through Cursor CLI.

plugins.name: cursed
plugins.description: Hand narrow, well-shaped tasks from Claude Code to non-Anthropic models (GPT, Gemini, Grok) through the Cursor CLI for adversarial code review, plan verification, scoped delegation, and decisive advice. Run `npm install` inside the installed plugin directory after install.
